lessons.title: Implement and manage storage for Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
FSLogix roams profiles in remote computing environments, such as Azure Virtual Desktop. You set up a FSLogix profile container share for a host pool using a virtual machine-based file share.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-manage-storage-azure-virtual-desktop/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement and manage storage for Azure Virtual Desktop

sources.title: Create and configure host pools and session hosts for Azure Virtual Desktop

lessons.title: Create and manage session host image for Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
A Shared Image Gallery simplifies custom image sharing across your organization. Custom images can be used to bootstrap deployment tasks like preloading applications, application configurations, and other OS configurations.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-manage-session-host-image/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create and manage session host image for Azure Virtual Desktop

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement an Azure Virtual Desktop infrastructure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement an Azure Virtual Desktop infrastructure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
